email_body:
Beste Quentin Suys,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Marketeer bij Apex Careers. Uw focus op social media campagnes en recruitment marketing sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik met mirook.com een volledige social media strategie opgezet (Instagram/Facebook) en campagnes gemonitord. Mijn analytische vaardigheden met Google Analytics, Search Console en SEMrush stellen mij in staat om KPI's zoals kosten per sollicitant te tracken en campagnes te optimaliseren.

Ik spreek goed Nederlands (B1) en volg lessen om verder te verbeteren. Ik ben leergierig, neem initiatief en werk graag in een jong, dynamisch team.

Ik kom graag langs om mijn motivatie en ideeën verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Quentin Suys,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Marketeer position at Apex Careers. Your focus on social media campaigns and recruitment marketing aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, with mirook.com I set up a full social media strategy (Instagram/Facebook) and monitored campaigns. My analytical skills with Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush enable me to track KPIs like cost per applicant and optimize campaigns.

I speak Dutch at B1 level and am taking classes to improve further. I am eager to learn, take initiative, and enjoy working in a young, dynamic team.

I would love to discuss my motivation and ideas in person.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste Quentin Suys,

Toen ik de vacature voor Marketeer bij Apex Careers las, voelde ik meteen een klik. Uw missie om bedrijven en mensen te matchen via creatieve social media campagnes spreekt mij enorm aan. Mijn ervaring in digitale marketing en contentcreatie sluit hier naadloos op aan.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van zoekwoordgerichte blogs en het beheren van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com een volledige social media strategie opgezet (Instagram en Facebook), inclusief het maken van posts, het plannen van content en het monitoren van engagement. Ook heb ik A/B-testen uitgevoerd om de effectiviteit van verschillende aanpakken te meten.

U zoekt iemand met ervaring in social media marketing, een sterk analytisch vermogen en creativiteit. Die combinatie bied ik. Ik ben gewend om te werken met KPI's en data-gedreven beslissingen te nemen. Bovendien ben ik proactief, neem ik graag initiatief en denk ik mee over strategie. Ik wil groeien, leren en plezier hebben in mijn werk — precies wat Apex Careers uitstraalt.

Hoewel ik nog geen specifieke ervaring heb in recruitment marketing, ben ik ervan overtuigd dat mijn vaardigheden in contentcreatie, campagnemonitoring en analyse direct inzetbaar zijn. Ik leer snel en ben gemotiveerd om mij te verdiepen in de recruitment sector.

Ik spreek Nederlands op B1-niveau en volg lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Daarnaast spreek ik vloeiend Engels en Turks.

Ik kom graag langs om mijn motivatie en ideeën voor Apex Careers verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Quentin Suys,

When I read the vacancy for Marketeer at Apex Careers, I immediately felt a connection. Your mission to match companies and people through creative social media campaigns really appeals to me. My experience in digital marketing and content creation aligns seamlessly.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blogs, and managing WordPress sites. I work with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to measure and optimize performance. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I set up a full social media strategy (Instagram and Facebook), including creating posts, scheduling content, and monitoring engagement. I also conducted A/B tests to measure the effectiveness of different approaches.

You are looking for someone with experience in social media marketing, strong analytical skills, and creativity. I offer that combination. I am used to working with KPIs and making data-driven decisions. Moreover, I am proactive, take initiative, and like to think along about strategy. I want to grow, learn, and have fun in my work — exactly what Apex Careers radiates.

Although I do not yet have specific experience in recruitment marketing, I am convinced that my skills in content creation, campaign monitoring, and analysis are immediately applicable. I learn quickly and am motivated to dive into the recruitment sector.

I speak Dutch at B1 level and am taking classes to improve further. I also speak fluent English and Turkish.

I would love to come by to further explain my motivation and ideas for Apex Careers.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Ervaring met social media campagnes (Instagram, Facebook) en contentcreatie voor mirook.com
Analytisch: tracken van KPI's met Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
Creatief: schrijven van overtuigende content en A/B-testen uitgevoerd
Proactief en leergierig: eigen project opgezet en continu geoptimaliseerd
Ervaring met WordPress, Elementor, Canva en AI-tools voor content
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Social Media · Content · SEO
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in social media marketing, content creation, and campaign analysis. At Episto, I run on-page SEO and content for client websites. On my own project (mirook.com), I developed and executed a full social media strategy on Instagram and Facebook, including content creation, scheduling, and performance monitoring. I am analytical, creative, and quick to learn new tools. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Social media marketing: content creation (posts, video), scheduling, community management, campaign monitoring (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok)
- Content & copywriting: SEO blog writing, persuasive ad copy, employer branding content
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads, KPI tracking (cost per applicant, conversion)
- A/B testing: designing and analyzing experiments to optimize ad performance
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Social Media & Content Strategy (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion
- Developed and executed a social media strategy on Instagram and Facebook: created posts, scheduled content, and monitored engagement
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve search visibility
- Ran iterative performance analyses, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
